[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A gray-furred macaque is shown outdoors with a cartoon face overlay, including black hair-like shapes, red curved accents, and a drawn black smile, alongside a floating blue emoticon graphic.

Main Subject:
A monkey with gray fur fills most of the frame from the chest up, looking off to the side with its mouth closed and visible facial fur texture; a black drawn outline forms a smile on its face, with red curved marks above the smile on both sides and black hair-like shapes framing the top of the head. A small, white rectangular piece near the lower right holds a blue, smiling face icon with teeth.

Setting:
The background appears to be an outdoor ground area with scattered dirt, small stones, and patches of dry vegetation, under natural daylight. The camera angle is close and slightly low, focused on the monkey’s face and upper body.

Visual Details:
The monkey’s fur is predominantly gray with lighter highlights on the muzzle and chest area. Overlaid graphics include large black “hair” shapes draped on both sides of the head, red curved lines above the eyes area on the overlay, and a thick black curved line depicting a smile across the lower face. Lighting is soft and daylight-like, with moderate shadowing on the monkey’s fur. The composition centers the monkey’s face, while the blue emoticon graphic is placed to the right of its muzzle area on a white background.

Visible Text:
SV Noybta

Practical Summary:
The image shows an outdoor monkey with a stylized cartoon overlay on its face and hair. A blue smiley-face icon appears on a white rectangle near the lower right of the monkey’s head.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
